title: Shared Part Configuration
description: Schema for config.json files in shared_parts directory

id.description: Maps internal system IDs to numeric identifiers for different partner systems

partner_id.description: Maps partner codes to numeric partner identifiers

name.description: Unique identifier for the shared part

externally_managed.description: Whether the account template can be edited in the Platform UI or only externally

hide_code.description: Whether to hide the underlying code from users

used_in.description: List of templates that use this shared part

id.description: Maps environment IDs to template IDs

type.description: Type of template using this shared part

handle.description: Unique identifier for the template using this shared part

partnerId.description: Legacy partner ID mapping (deprecated, use partner_id)

partner_id.description: Maps partner codes to numeric partner identifiers

text.description: Path to the main Liquid template file
